changelog: FIX — Channel picker sheet now properly TRAPS focus and DISMISSES with Back. Previously the sheet had no focus-trap so DPad UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT was navigating the page underneath, and Back was exiting Sports entirely instead of just closing the sheet.
Sheet outer Box is now focusable() + grabs focus via FocusRequester on first composition; underlying LeaguePillBar/GameCardsRail can no longer receive key events while sheet is open.
Added BackHandler (covers hardware Back) in addition to the existing onPreviewKeyEvent (covers DPad Back) — both call onDismiss directly. Close behaviour is now reliable on every Android TV remote.

Loading / error / no-match empty states now have a focusable DISMISS button so focus always has a target inside the sheet — previously empty states had no focusable element and focus stayed stuck on the GameCard underneath.
Background opacity 0xE6 → 0xFF (fully opaque) so the page behind is hidden, not bleeding through dimly.
